blocks.text: Section 27 Other quasi-judicial assignments such as coach, adviser,

coordinators trainer considered seasonal/occasional designations may still be given credit unit, but are financially compensated upon approval of the formal request and presentation of output/s subject to the availability of funds. If funds are not sufficient, they shall be compensated in the form of non-monetary renumeration. If COCs are maximized, they may be given recognition in other forms.
Section 28 An instructor with a WL of 30 (from doing research,

extension, IGP) but with a TL of only 24 units (teaching 8 courses of 3 units each) will not be given honoraria/ overload pay. It must be noted that researchers, extensionists, and IGP managers/workers are given incentives under separate incentive schemes.
Section 29 The maximum WL that will be considered for permanent
faculty is 30 units and for contractual faculty is 36 units.
Any WO in excess of that will not be given credit for COCs and treated as services to the university that may be given recognition in.
Section 30 A faculty member designated as Vice President/campus
Director satisfies the required WL of 24 units, hence he/she has the option to do activities supportive to any combination or all the mandated functions of the
Section 31 For research functions/creative works, one research

study/creative work is equivalent to 3 units WL. A research study/creative work will be considered WL in a semester if it is to be implemented within a minimum of 3 months within said semester. Lower that that, it will be treated a fraction thereof (e.g. study for 2 months will be 1.2 WLL only as a result of 3/5 = 6 x 2 = 1.2). For team research/creative work, the equivalent WL units shall be divided based on the number of researchers/authors. For research studies/project/creative works funded by personal funds or sourced out from external funding agencies, these can be given due WL provided these had been properly reported to and recorder by CORDEX and a research/creative work contract had been executed between the researcher/author and the University stipulating among others that the result must be published

fixed_blocks.text:
17 Section 27 Other quasi-judicial assignments such as coach, adviser, coordinators, trainer considered seasonal/occasional designations may still be given credit unit, but are financially compensated upon approval of the formal request and presentation of output/s subject to the availability of funds. If funds are not sufficient, they shall be compensated in the form of non-monetary renumeration. If COCs are maximized, they may be given recognition in other forms.

Section 28 An instructor with a WL of 30 (from doing research, extension, IGP) but with a TL of only 24 units (teaching 8 courses of 3 units each) will not be given honoraria/ overload pay. It must be noted that researchers, extensionists, and IGP managers/workers are given incentives under separate incentive schemes.

Section 29 The maximum WL that will be considered for permanent faculty is 30 units and for contractual faculty is 36 units.

Any WO in excess of that will not be given credit for COCs and treated as services to the university that may be given recognition in.

Section 30 A faculty member designated as Vice President/campus Director satisfies the required WL of 24 units, hence he/she has the option to do activities supportive to any combination or all the mandated functions of the

University.

Section 31 For research functions/creative works, one research study/creative work is equivalent to 3 units WL. A research study/creative work will be considered WL in a semester if it is to be implemented within a minimum of 3 months within said semester. Lower that that, it will be treated as a fraction thereof (e.g., study for 2 months will be 1.2 WLL only as a result of 3/5 = 6 x 2 = 1.2). For team research/creative work, the equivalent WL units shall be divided based on the number of researchers/authors. For research studies/project/creative works funded by personal funds or sourced out from external funding agencies, these can be given due WL provided these had been properly reported to and recorded by CORDEX and a research/creative work contract had been executed between the researcher/author and the University stipulating among others that the result must be published

qa_pairs.question: What types of quasi-judicial assignments may still be given credit unit but are financially compensated upon approval?
qa_pairs.answer: Other coach, adviser, coordinators, and trainers considered seasonal/occasional designations.

qa_pairs.question: Can a researcher/author receive WL for team research/creative work? If so, how are the equivalent WL units divided?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, team research/creative work can be given WL units. The equivalent WL units shall be divided based on the number of researchers/authors.

qa_pairs.question: What is the minimum implementation period for a research study/creative work to be considered WL in a semester?

qa_pairs.answer: Raw JSON list of objects, where each object has exactly two keys: 'question' and 'answer'.

qa_pairs.question: Can I include introductory or concluding text, explanations, or notes in the output?
qa_pairs.answer: No, do not wrap the JSON in markdown code blocks or include any additional text.
